top_signals.title: Ferrari shares fall 7% after luxury carmaker launches first fully electric vehicle
top_signals.summary: Shares of luxury carmaker Ferrari fell sharply on Tuesday morning, shortly after the company launched its first fully electric vehicle.

top_signals.title: US Marine Corps tests using helicopter as mobile drone command center
top_signals.summary: During the test, troops launched a Neros Archer FPV drone from the ground before transferring control to operators aboard a helicopter orbiting miles away.

top_signals.title: SOCOM begins fielding new battlefield biometrics system
top_signals.summary: Reveal Technology’s Identifi platform allows operators to collect fingerprints, facial scans, iris data and voice recognition in the field.

top_signals.title: Japan Cosmetic Association head guilty of bribing former University of Tokyo researchers
top_signals.summary: The Tokyo District Court sentenced Koichi Hikichi to one year in prison for bribery linked to joint research with the university.
